nodes.label: JTC24 DPP Standards (x8)
nodes.detail: 5 of 8 prENs known. Target 31 Mar 2026 — missed; status pending agent-refresh (planned 2026-04-28). Slipped from Dec 2025.

nodes.label: ESPR DPP Registry
nodes.detail: Art. 13 ESPR. Default for construction DPP unless Art. 75 DA overrides.

nodes.label: ESPR Web Portal
nodes.detail: Art. 14 ESPR. Hard dependency via Art. 79(3) — no override. Almost zero public info.

nodes.label: ESPR Service Provider DA
nodes.detail: Consultation Apr 2025, summary Aug 2025. Not yet adopted.

nodes.label: CPR DPP Registry
nodes.detail: Art. 75(3). May be same system as ESPR registry or separate.

nodes.label: Art. 75(1) Delegated Act
nodes.detail: Single most important unknown. No Better Regulation entry. 'Q4 2026' is industry aspiration, not EC commitment.

nodes.label: System Operational (+6mo)
nodes.detail: Art. 80(1). 6 months after Art. 75(1) DA entry into force.

nodes.label: DPP Obligation Mandatory (+18mo)
nodes.detail: Art. 22(7) + Art. 80(1). 18 months after Art. 75(1) DA entry into force.

cross_cutting.label: AVS Delegated Act (Art. 10)
cross_cutting.detail: Revised draft Dec 2025. Feedback closed 7 Jan 2026. Adoption H1 2026.

cross_cutting.label: Horizontal SReq (Dangerous Substances)
cross_cutting.detail: Draft Sep 2025. Covers all 37 families via CEN/TC 351.

cross_cutting.label: Annex II Environmental Indicators
cross_cutting.detail: Phase 1 (GWP): applicable 8 Jan 2026, enforcement 8 Jan 2027. Phase 2: 9 Jan 2030. Phase 3: 9 Jan 2032.
